meaning: n.爱斯基摩人adj.爱斯基摩人的
examples: Tooth analyses also suggest that there were two later migrations of Na-Denes and Eskimo-Aleut.
The third wave, perhaps 10,000 or 9,000 years ago, saw the migration from North-east Asia of groups ancestral to the modern Eskimo and Aleut.
The Eskimo nebula is clearly a planetary nebula.
Throw in his Yup'ik Eskimo ancestry, and it all makes for quite a package.
Dogs including Siberian Huskies, Alaskan Malamutes, Samoyeds and Canadian Eskimo Dogs had been competing in teams of between two and eight.
